headline: Otis Singapore Elevator Win Highlights Sustainability And Long Term Investor Questions
summary: Otis Worldwide has been selected to supply high performance, energy efficient elevators for a new upscale development in Singapore. The project will use Otis Gen2 and Gen3 systems, which are designed with energy saving features and smart building integration. This contract reinforces Otis's role in major international urban infrastructure projects focused on sustainability. For investors watching NYSE:OTIS, this Singapore win lands at a time when the stock trades around $70.75 and longer...
